text:
This is preponterous. One possible way out is to
divide the remainder by 75 to get three groups. Then the
Vighatis 0 to 15, 31 to 45, 61 to 75 should indicate male birth,
and the rest a female birth.
The theory as stated is not acceptable.
III. Some amendments are made to the above theory by
the way of a double check-up. According to this, multiply the
birth Vighatis by three and divide it by seven. The remainder
counted from Sunday in the order of week-days, must agree
with the day of birth.
Take the example of birth at lOgh. 58 vigh. The Vighatis
are 658 which when multiplied by three and divide by
seven leaves no remainder. It is then seven which is Saturday.
Bnt the native was born on a Thursday. What should we do
then? 668 multiplied by four and divided by nine gives four
which agrees with the birth constellation. If the birth is at 11
gh. 16 vgh, the two will agree - birth constellation and the
week-day. We are notjnstified in adding 18 Vighatis to the
birth time.
The late Mr.
